test-case.name: "before all" hook for "should open portfolio site and submit contact form"

failure.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 145 Current browser version is 147.0.7727.56 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe
